title: Red Bauble Tree Decorations Merry Christmas Greetings Card Large A4 Size 210mm x 297mm Including Envelope DH101
features: A high quality printed A4 size Merry Christmas greeting card from Prickly Products, a small family business based in Dorset.
Blank on the inside for your own message.
Printed on 330 gsm recyclable card, folded size is 297mm x 210mm.
Supplied with a plain white envelope.
Dispatched in a hardback envelope and delivered by Royal Mail.
description: A high quality printed A4 Merry Christmas Greetings card from Prickly Products, a small family business based in Dorset. The front cover features red baubels on a decorated christmas tree, the inside is blank so plenty of space for your own messages. Great size for offices, work places, schools, clubs and groups as it allows multiple signatures/messages across the inside pages. Supplied with white envelope. Swift 330 gsm paper Environmental Factors: Produced by an ISO 9001 accredited supplier Pulp is bleached using an Elemental Chlorine Free (ECF) process. Material can be disposed of by recycling, incineration for energy recovery and composting. Produced at a mill that is certified to the ISO14001 environmental management standard.
